description:
Is Catan really just luck… or is there actual mathematics behind winning? 🥇

In this video, we analyse over 47,000 recorded games of Catan to explore the probability, strategy, game theory, and statistics hidden underneath one of the world’s most popular board games, and show you how you can use:

🎲 Dice probabilities
📈 Expected value and pip weighting
🧠 Resource optimisation
🛣️ Longest Road and Largest Army
💥 Monopoly card “resource shocks”
📊 Predicting winners using data
🌐 Catan as a graph theory problem

to bring your Catan game to the next level 🫡🤝 

Using concepts from probability, stochastic systems, optimisation, and empirical analysis, we break down what actually matters in Catan, and whether skill really beats luck. 🍀

This video was made possible thanks to the Colonist dataset provided by twosheep.io. 🐑🐑

My Socials:
📸: https://www.instagram.com/ioanaroman27/

Hope you have enjoyed this video! Make sure to give it a like and subscribe to my channel for more maths, quant, and... maybe Catan? content!! 😌

Have a wonderful day and hope to see you in the next one!! xx
fulltitle: I Analysed 47,000 Games of Catan. Here's How to Win Every Time (mathematically) 🎲🐑
